memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial - Find a Grave
memoryArtifacts.description:
Mrs. Susanna Bragg was the mother of five children baptized at the Church of Saint James the Great in Colchester, Essex, England.

She accompanied her husband and children before 18 May 1612 to Leiden …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial-Find a Grave
memoryArtifacts.description:
Robert Bragg probably originated in Essex, England.

He married Susanna ______ before 1590. They were the parents of five children baptized at the Church of Saint James the Great in Colchester, Essex, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna Duijck於1578年出生在荷蘭布拉班特時，她的父親Hughe Duijck20歲，母親Ann Thomas Drake15歲。她於1602年與Wilhelm Brike在荷蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1623年2月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanna Duijck于1578年出生在荷兰布拉班特时，她的父亲Hughe Duijck20岁，母亲Ann Thomas Drake15岁。她于1602年与Wilhelm Brike在荷兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1623年2月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯享年45岁。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

historicEvents.description: The Union of Utrecht brought together seven northern, Protestant provinces of the Netherlands against the Catholics. Known as the United Provinces, they become the foundation of the Dutch Republic. The Treaty of Utrecht was signed, marking the beginning of the Dutch Republic.
The Dutch declared their independence from Spain.
Britain waged wars against the Dutch.
"The United East India Company (V.O.C.), destined to become a powerful force in Holland's ""Golden Age""of discovery, exploration, and trade, is founded."
Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn was born in Leiden, the Netherlands.
"English navigator Henry Hudson, under contract to the United East India Company, sails from Amsterdam and ""discovers""Manhattan Island and the future site of New York."

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna Duijck was born in 1578, in Brabant, Netherlands, her father, Hughe Duijck, was 20 and her mother, Ann Thomas Drake, was 15. She married Wilhelm Brike in 1602, in Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 26 February 1623, in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna Duijck est née en 1578, à Brabant, Pays-Bas, son père, Hughe Duijck, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ann Thomas Drake, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Wilhelm Brike en 1602, à Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 février 1623, à Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susanna Duijck 1578 in Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hughe Duijck 20 und ihre Mutter Ann Thomas Drake 15. Sie hat 1602 in Niederlande Wilhelm Brike geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Februar 1623 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Duijck è nata il nel 1578 nel Brabant, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Hughe Duijck, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Ann Thomas Drake, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Wilhelm Brike nel 1602, nel Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 febbraio 1623, nel Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Duijckが1578年にオランダブラバントで生まれた時，父Hughe Duijckは20歳，母Ann Thomas Drakeは15歳であった。1602年にオランダでWilhelm Brikeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1623年2月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルヤーモウスで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Duijck(이)가 1578년 네덜란드 브라반트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hughe Duijck(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Thomas Drake(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1602년 네덜란드에서 Wilhelm Brike(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1623년 2월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 야모우스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Duijck nasceu em 1578, em Brabant, Países Baixos, seu pai, Hughe Duijck, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ann Thomas Drake, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Wilhelm Brike em 1602, em Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1623, em Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna Duijck родилась в 1578 г. в местности брабант, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Hughe Duijck было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Thomas Drake, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wilhelm Brike в 1602 г. в местности Нидерланды. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 февраля 1623 г. в местности ярмоут, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 45 лет.
